---
title: "CV Application"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "A dynamic web app that allows users to input their information and generates a live CV with an option to download the PDF."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-10-18
image: ../utils/cv-application.png
categories:
  - React
  - Vite
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://cv-application-plum-chi.vercel.app/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/cv-application" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>
